summary: Independent verification of Google OAuth redirect_uri_mismatch fix. All 6 backend tests pass and Performance page loads correctly with Google connect button visible and no 'not configured' warning.
critical_code_review_comments: routes_google.py OK: dual decorator @api.get('/google/callback') + @api.get('/google/oauth/callback') on same handler is a valid FastAPI pattern; both paths return 400 on invalid state as expected.
redirect_uri returned by /api/google/login matches .env exactly: https://content-logi-pro.preview.emergentagent.com/api/google/oauth/callback — this eliminates Google 'redirect_uri_mismatch' error.
Recharts warnings (width/height=-1) on Performance page are cosmetic (ResponsiveContainer sizing timing) — not related to this fix.
verified_behaviors: GET /api/google/login → authorization_url with redirect_uri = https://content-logi-pro.preview.emergentagent.com/api/google/oauth/callback (exact match with .env)
GET /api/google/callback?code=x&state=invalid → 400 (legacy route still works — backward compat)
Regression OK: /api/linkedin/status, /api/meta/status, /api/gbp/status all 200; /api/meta/login and /api/gbp/login return authorization_url
Frontend /performance: no 'OAuth pas encore configuré' banner; 'Se connecter avec Google' button present; MOCKED data banner shown as expected
context_for_next_testing_agent: Google OAuth fix (dual callback route) fully verified. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_google_oauth_fix.py reusable for regression. NOTE: /api/auth/login response uses key 'token' not 'access_token'.
